demo.title: demo.sh
demo.code:
# Check a server's published grade before your agent uses it
npx polygraphso check npm/@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem
# → polygraph: A · litmus-v9

# Grade your own MCP server end-to-end (A–F + reproducible evidence)
npx -y -p @polygraphso/litmus polygraphso-litmus litmus npm/@your-scope/your-mcp-server

# Gate CI: fail the build on a D/F MCP server or skill
npx @polygraphso/litmus ci

setup: Check any MCP server before your agent uses it: `npx polygraphso check <registry>/<owner>/<name>`
Verify before you trust: require the live tool-surface fingerprint to match the attestation before executing
Gate CI on grades with the GitHub Action `polygraphso/litmus@v1`, or run `npx @polygraphso/litmus ci` in any pipeline
